title: TranslateRequest
description: The request body for IBM Watson Language Translator translate calls.

text.description: Input text in UTF-8 encoding. Submit a maximum of 50 KB of text.

model_id.description: A globally unique string that identifies the underlying model used for translation (e.g., en-es for English to Spanish).

source.description: Language code specifying the language of the input text. If omitted, the service detects the source language automatically.

target.description: Language code specifying the target language for translation. Required if model_id is not specified.
